skills.name: fabrik-overview
skills.title: Read the Fabrik overview
skills.description: Get a concise, structured overview of what Fabrik is, what it runs today, and where it is going. Useful when an agent first encounters the project.

skills.name: fabrik-full-context
skills.title: Read the full Fabrik site as Markdown
skills.description: Returns the homepage, design rationale, target documentation, and every blog post concatenated into a single Markdown document. Useful for building an in-context index of the project.

skills.name: fabrik-blog
skills.title: Read the Fabrik blog
skills.description: List and read release notes, design decisions, and field notes from the Fabrik project.

skills.name: fabrik-source
skills.title: Inspect the Fabrik source code
skills.description: Browse the implementation, file issues, and open pull requests against the canonical Fabrik repository.
